name: VoiceLogPro
description: VoiceLogPro is a voice-to-PDF daily construction log app for subcontractors — general contractors, electricians, plumbers, HVAC, and roofers speak their on-site daily report and it becomes a timestamped, court-admissible PDF with fields for weather, crew, work performed, and materials, protecting mechanic's-lien and delay claims.
disambiguatingDescription: VoiceLogPro is a voice-to-PDF daily construction log app (voice on-site → timestamped, court-admissible daily-report PDF) — not a general-purpose meeting/voice-transcription tool (Otter, Rev, Fireflies), and not a full construction-management platform (Procore, Raken).
knowsAbout: UK Building Safety Act Golden Thread
